name: sample_sobol_synthaorta_v2_100
_doc: 256 Sobol samples over a 7-D cube using the SynthAorta paper (Bošnjak et al. 2025) Table I distributions for the radii and arch curvature, plus engineering uniform distributions for the lengths and arch angle. taper_mode held fixed at smoothstep so the cube is purely continuous. N=256 is the Sobol-native power of 2 above the PCE rule-of-thumb (30·dim=210 at 7-D).
